events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a situation where the view of NM/MC cable routing & protection cuts off the area where exposure control would be visible, and the crew location and energy/fall-protection boundary cannot be determined. The task is to evaluate the field condition.

Given that the view cuts off the critical area and crew location/energy boundary cannot be determined, this is a case where we don't have enough information to make a definitive pass/fail decision. The appropriate decision would be "needs_more_info".

Let me construct the JSON response.
